scope.note: Every number in this file is FICTION (see __fixtures__/README.md). The workflowReliability block is valid except rawAggregate.cancelRate = 1.5, which violates the z.number().min(0).max(1) bound — check-scorecard.mjs MUST exit 1. This is a RANGE-contract failure, not a threshold: 0.94 is legal data (see valid-full.json), 1.5 is not a rate. If it ever exits 0, the range contract has drifted.
